nodes.label: AI as proofreading assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I have been using AI to do proofreading and sometimes help when I'm having difficulty with awkward sentences

nodes.label: AI alignment with personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: Do I think it matches my 'voice'

nodes.label: AI reliability and factuality
nodes.grounding_span: I don't trust AI research to be 100% factual

nodes.label: AI as creative assistant preserving human authorship
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human authorship
nodes.grounding_span: the review is still mine; I'm simply using an available tool to improve the product

nodes.label: AI as editing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: Most of the time, it goes seamlessly

nodes.label: AI's ability to produce authentic voice
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to capture voice in longer form
nodes.grounding_span: If the AI learned to effectively capture my voice in longer form, I'd be happy to take a step back

nodes.label: Authentic personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: Do I think it matches my 'voice'

nodes.label: Accuracy and factual reliability
nodes.grounding_span: it would be embarrassing if I had a reader contact me and tell me something wasn't correct

nodes.label: Autonomy and personal control
nodes.grounding_span: The opinion is mine. The reasoning is mine.

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as editing aid
nodes.grounding_span: I feel that my using the AI as an editor resulted in a better review

nodes.label: Frustration with AI when it deviates from tone
nodes.grounding_span: AI has deviated too far from my tone and even changed the meaning

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I would hope that as AI becomes more advanced, I will be able to gradually cede more of the nuts-and-bolts writing to it

nodes.label: Cautious skepticism about AI accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I don't trust AI research to be 100% factual

nodes.label: Proactive adaptation to AI rather than fear of replacement
nodes.grounding_span: I don't ascribe to that because the review is still mine

nodes.label: Evaluative and selective acceptance of AI suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: decided on a case-by-case basis what to accept and what to reject

nodes.label: Incremental paragraph-by-paragraph workflow
nodes.grounding_span: I send the review through on a paragraph by paragraph basis
